## Checklist

- [ ] ASCII-only in all new or modified files (no smart quotes, em-dashes, or non-ASCII punctuation)
- [ ] No version labels, roadmap items, or future-tagged content in shipped files
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, account IDs, or zone IDs committed
- [ ] If adding clue bank entries: all four difficulty clues are present, answer is uppercase A-Z only, id is a unique lowercase hyphenated slug
- [ ] If touching the Worker: no real Wrangler credentials committed
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
